news:news.news:title: The ongoing war in Iran is causing widespread economic distress and geopolitical tensions, impacting various sectors globally.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran war economic impact, US Venezuela relations, Brazil pet custody law

news:news.news:title: Oil prices surged following Trump's warning to Iran, while Blue Owl Capital faced withdrawal limits amid declining confidence in the private credit market.
news:news.news:keywords: oil price fluctuations, impact of Trump's policies on markets, Blue Owl Capital withdrawal limits, Oracle job cuts and AI investment, analysis of Trump's tariffs

news:news.news:title: Archive of Our Own exits beta after 17 years, while Granola app raises privacy concerns over note-sharing settings.
news:news.news:keywords: privacy concerns in tech, updates on fanfiction platforms, Reddit feed changes, AirPods discounts, innovative bike accessories

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods faces DUI charges following a crash, while Phil Mickelson will miss the Masters due to family health issues.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods DUI arrest details, Phil Mickelson Masters withdrawal, Stephon Gilmore NFL retirement news, NCAA Final Four updates, NFL draft prospects analysis

news:news.news:title: NASA's Artemis II mission marks the first crewed Moon flyby in over 50 years, signaling a new era in lunar exploration.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission details, ancient gambling practices in America, new cancer treatment discoveries, innovations in cooking techniques, recent discoveries in biology

news:news.news:title: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake struck off Indonesia, while Israel escalates attacks in Lebanon amidst ongoing geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, impact of natural disasters, political developments in the US, Italy's World Cup failure, crime and safety in South Africa

news:news.news:title: SpaceX confidentially files for a public offering, while oil prices drop and markets rally amid geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: SpaceX IPO news, Oil prices and market reactions, Oracle job cuts and AI investment, US fuel price trends, Washington millionaire tax implications

news:news.news:title: NASA successfully launched the Artemis II mission, marking a significant step toward returning humans to the Moon.
news:news.news:keywords: NASA Artemis II mission launch, legal issues with Moon base project, Apple iPhone anniversary, Kia EV3 electric SUV announcement, April Fools' Day tech pranks

news:news.news:title: Puka Nacua enters rehab amid legal issues, while Tiger Woods receives permission to seek treatment abroad and the NCAA considers new eligibility rules for athletes.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA eligibility changes, Tiger Woods treatment, Puka Nacua rehab news, Celtics scoring record, World Cup ticket prices

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries range from microbial insights in colon cancer to the evolutionary history of squid, highlighting diverse advancements in understanding health and biology.
news:news.news:keywords: microbial fingerprints in cancer treatment, new species discovery in rainforest, effects of caffeine on behavior, evolutionary history of squid, impact of deep sleep on health

news:news.news:title: Greece Storm Claims Lives as US Oil Hits $110; Oracle Cuts Jobs Amid AI Shift
Indonesia Quakes as SpaceX Preps for IPO and NASA Reaches for the Moon with Artemis II Launch
